nasb.text: And He went out again by the seashore; and all the people were coming to Him, and He was teaching them.

esv.text: He went out again beside the sea, and all the crowd was coming to him, and he was teaching them.

cnv.text: 耶穌又出去，到了加利利海邊；眾人都到他面前來，他就教導他們。

ccb.text: 耶稣又出去到了湖边。有一大群人围拢过来，祂就教导他们。

csbs.text: 后来，耶稣又出去，到了加利利湖边。众人都来到他那里，他就教导他们。
